meta.title: Greensheet — Specialty Green Coffee Sourcing
meta.description: Source traceable specialty green coffee by origin, process, and SCA cup score. Samples ship in 48 hours.

campaigns.title: Campaigns
campaigns.subtitle: Automation and A/B testing for your nurture sequences

cof001.label: New harvest introduction
cof001.objective: Introduce newly landed lots to fresh prospects and earn the first interaction

cof002.label: Sample kit invitation
cof002.objective: Invite roasters to cup before they commit and lower the decision barrier

cof003.label: Roaster case study
cof003.objective: Build trust with a peer roaster story backed by cupping data

cof004.label: Availability update
cof004.objective: Share remaining inventory and arrival dates to create legitimate urgency

cof005.label: Re-engagement and feedback
cof005.objective: Re-activate silent prospects and learn their sourcing plans

cof001.subject: New arrival: {origin} {varietal} · SCA {sca_cup_score}
cof001.preheader: {process_method} lot from {origin} — {flavor_notes}. Just landed at Greensheet.
cof001.body:
Hi {contact_first_name},

Our newest {origin} lot just landed: {varietal}, {process_method} process, scoring {sca_cup_score} on the SCA scale, with notes of {flavor_notes}. It is priced at {price_per_lb}/lb with {available_lbs} lbs available.

You can cup it before you commit — samples ship within 48 hours.

— {sender_name}, Greensheet

cof002.subject: Cup {origin} before your next menu cycle
cof002.preheader: Your sample kit ships in 48 hours — {origin} {varietal} inside.
cof002.body:
Hi {contact_first_name},

Taste before you commit. The {origin} sample kit includes the {varietal} ({process_method}, SCA {sca_cup_score}) our Q graders scored this week. Request your kit and we will ship within 48 hours — free for qualified roasters.

— {sender_name}, Greensheet

cof003.subject: How {peer_roaster_name} built a menu around {origin}
cof003.preheader: A roaster case study: {process_method} lots scoring SCA {sca_cup_score}+.
cof003.body:
Hi {contact_first_name},

{peer_roaster_name} added our {origin} {varietal} ({process_method}) to their single-origin menu last season — and sold through their first {order_volume_lbs} lbs in {sell_through_weeks} weeks. Here is what made it work, with the cupping data behind it.

— {sender_name}, Greensheet

cof004.subject: {available_lbs} lbs left of {origin} {varietal}
cof004.preheader: Landing {arrival_date} — reserve before it is gone.
cof004.body:
Hi {contact_first_name},

A quick availability update: only {available_lbs} lbs remain of the {origin} {varietal} ({process_method}, SCA {sca_cup_score}). The next container lands {arrival_date}, and reserved lots ship first. Reserve now to lock in {price_per_lb}/lb.

— {sender_name}, Greensheet

cof005.subject: Still sourcing for {harvest_window}, {contact_first_name}?
cof005.preheader: Tell us what you are looking for — we will match the right lots.
cof005.body:
Hi {contact_first_name},

We noticed the {origin} {varietal} did not make it onto your menu this time. If your plans for {harvest_window} are still open, reply with what you are looking for — process, score range, budget — and we will match lots to your list. Or book 15 minutes with our sourcing team.

— {sender_name}, Greensheet

emailFooter.sentBecause: You received this email because {roaster_name} is registered with Greensheet.
emailFooter.postalAddress: Greensheet, 548 Market St, San Francisco, CA 94104, USA

cof002.body: Greensheet: {origin} {varietal} (SCA {sca_cup_score}) samples ship in 48 hrs. Grab your kit: {sample_kit_url} Reply STOP to opt out.

cof004.body: Greensheet: only {available_lbs} lbs left of {origin} {varietal}. Reserve: {lot_url} Reply STOP to opt out.

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.generic: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

codes.AUTH_SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
codes.AUTH_FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to perform this action.
codes.NET_OFFLINE: You appear to be offline. Check your connection and try again.
codes.NET_TIMEOUT: The request timed out. Please try again.
codes.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
codes.VAL_REQUIRED_FIELD: Please fill in all required fields.
codes.VAL_INVALID_EMAIL: Please enter a valid email address.
codes.VAL_BUDGET_RANGE: Budget ceiling must be between {{min}} and {{max}}.
codes.LOT_NOT_FOUND: This lot could not be found. It may no longer be available.
codes.ORDER_FAILED: Your order could not be processed. No charge was made — please try again.
codes.PAYMENT_DECLINED: Your payment was declined. Please try a different payment method.
codes.IDEMPOTENCY_CONFLICT: Duplicate submission detected. Your original order is unchanged.
codes.SERVER_ERROR: Our servers are busy right now. Please try again shortly.
